name: Tierra, Source of Destruction
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>創</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ｔｉｅｒｒａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ティエラ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by shuffling 10 other cards with different names from your hand and/or field into the Deck and/or Extra Deck, and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. If this card is Special Summoned: Shuffle all cards into the Deck, except this card, from each player's hand, field, Graveyard, and face-up Pendulum Monsters from the Extra Deck. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Unclassified, Trigger, Condition
action: Returns from hand to Deck for Summon
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns from field to Extra Deck for Summon
Returns from Extra Deck to Main Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
